dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The governance-context-builder step successfully executed and passed schema validation, resolving the critical JSON parsing failure observed in the baseline. This provided a solid foundation for the assessment.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The architecture-work-assessment step completed with a high volume of completion tokens (13,772), more than doubling the baseline output. This indicates a significantly more detailed causal analysis of the architectural work.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The agent successfully integrated the governance context into the final assessment. The high total token count for the assessment step suggests that trade-offs were explored in the context of the established rules.
